name: An Outhouse
description:
This small space smells worse than a huge stable holding four hundred head
of cattle who haven't been outside for three months.  This place smells BAD.  
Two holes dug in opposing corners offer incense to remember, your feet squish
into the wet dirt floor, and although you consider yourself a relatively strong
person, you find your gorge rising, and your inability to suppress it only
validates the fact that this place REALLY STINKS.
